name: Le roman de Renard
summary: In the kingdom of animals, Master Fox is used to trick and fool everyone. So the King, the Lion, receives more and more complaints about him. He orders that Master Fox is arrested and brough to him... One of the first animation film with puppets. The story is taken from a from a French medieval fable.

name: Mickey's Amateurs
summary: 这一次，米老鼠（沃尔特·迪斯尼 Walt Disney 配音）担当了某电台业余者表演秀的主持人。继上一位挑战失败者之后，唐老鸭（克拉伦斯·纳什 Clarence Nash 配音）迈着自信的步伐走上舞台，他演唱了《一闪一闪亮晶晶》，可是中间却忘记了歌词，最终被米老鼠强硬地请下舞台。接下来上场的是母鸡克萝拉和母牛贝尔，她们进行了一场钢琴伴奏演唱，好在节目有惊无险地结束了。之后见到的是号称十项全能的高菲（Pinto Colvig 配音），他带来数十种乐器，为观众们献上一场独人乐队的精彩演出。高潮时分却又状况不断。

name: Porky's Duck Hunt
summary: Porky tries out his new hunting gear and blasts a hole in his apartment roof (and neighbor's backside). At the swamp, neither he nor the other hunters can hit anything. Porky sets out decoys, then can't tell the real duck from them; he wades out there, but his shotgun gets waterlogged. He shoots a barrel of rum, and some fish get drunk, get in a rowboat, and sing "Moonlight Bay...
